summary: Iteration 55: Tested hero section consistency across pages (About, Sponsor, Transformations, Media, Contact) and footer features (golden divider line, Contact dialog, inquiry dropdowns). Fixed Media and Contact page hero colors to match reference style (gold title, white subtitle). All 15 tests passed.

issues: Console warning: DialogContent requires DialogTitle for accessibility. Consider adding VisuallyHidden DialogTitle.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 55 verified hero section consistency and footer features. FIXES APPLIED: (1) MediaPage.jsx and ContactPage.jsx hero sections had reversed colors (white title, gold subtitle) - fixed to match reference style (gold title, white subtitle). The database settings override colors for About/Sponsor/Transformations pages, but Media/Contact had no settings so they used code defaults which were wrong. Fixed code defaults to: H1 color=GOLD, subtitle color=#fff. All hero sections now consistent: gold title (small-caps), white uppercase subtitle with wide letter-spacing, gold divider line. FOOTER FEATURES verified: (1) Golden divider line visible between phone and Terms & Conditions. (2) Contact at bottom of MENU column. (3) Contact opens dialog (not navigates to /contact). (4) Dialog has inquiry dropdown with Program/Session/Other options. (5) Selecting Program/Session shows second dropdown with names. (6) Lato font used throughout footer. CONTACT PAGE verified: Has inquiry dropdown with Program/Session/Other and conditional second dropdown.

hero_section_consistency.style: Gold title (rgb(212,170-175,55-94)), white subtitle (rgb(255,255,255)), gold divider line

footer_golden_divider.location: Between phone number and Terms & Conditions in CONTACT US column

footer_contact_button.behavior: Opens dialog, does NOT navigate to /contact

about_page_meet_healer_preserved.verified: Image and name (Dimple Ranawat) visible in mid-section

media_page_hero.change: Changed H1 color from '#fff' to 'GOLD' and subtitle color from 'GOLD' to '#fff'

contact_page_hero.change: Changed H1 color from '#fff' to 'GOLD' and subtitle color from 'GOLD' to '#fff'
